title: Change column status when every column has data in it
excerpt: I want to have a column that changes status when every column has data in it instead of needing to scroll right to see if everything is complete

posts.author: jorgesnaptosell (Jorge Becker)
posts.cookedHtml: I want to have a column that changes status when every column has data in it instead of needing to scroll right to see if everything is complete
